node.name: Goals, Metrics & Constraints
node.objective: Define success criteria, key metrics, hard constraints (budget, timeline, team), and what "good" looks like

node.name: Customer & Persona Research
node.objective: Who are the target customers, what are their jobs-to-be-done, pain points, and decision criteria

node.name: Market & Competitive Landscape
node.objective: Market size, growth, key players, competitive dynamics, positioning whitespace

node.name: Value Proposition & Differentiation
node.objective: What unique value do we deliver, to whom, and why can't they get it elsewhere — validated against nodes 2 and 3

node.name: Channel & Acquisition Strategy
node.objective: How do we reach customers — channels ranked by fit/cost/scalability given personas from node 2

node.name: Pricing & Monetization Model
node.objective: Pricing model, tiers, and rationale — grounded in customer WTP (node 2) and competitive benchmarks (node 3)

node.name: Risk Scenarios & Mitigations
node.objective: Top 5 risks to the strategy; for each: likelihood, impact, early warning signal, mitigation

node.name: Strategic Roadmap & Next Steps
node.objective: Phased plan (Now / Next / Later) with owners, milestones, and decision gates. Resolve any conflicts between channels (node 5) and pricing (node 6). End with confidence score and vs-vanilla-Claude summary.
